merge.comment: Set FACTORY_MERGE=1 to enable autonomous squash-merge

worktree.comment: Worktrees created as siblings of the repo

byok.comment: When true, only use models whose API keys are present in env

cost_tracking.comment: Per-task token usage and cost logged for analysis

ci.comment: Set FACTORY_SKIP_CI=1 to skip waiting for GitHub Actions CI before merging

sandbox.comment: Containment for agentic build runs. Disable per-run with --no-sandbox or FACTORY_SANDBOX=0. Empty network.allow denies all egress; non-empty leaves egress open (per-host filtering is logged as degraded in v1).
